iran_nuke.notes: Day 15 03:04 — FALLING STABLE. No new nuclear signals. Kharg strikes remain conventional oil infrastructure targeting. Parchin bunker penetration confirmed by Institute for Science + Intl Security — bunker busters hit interior of Taleghan 2 high-explosive chamber. Still conventional, not nuclear-related. Nuclear track continues de-escalation. 15 stable.

iran_conventional.notes: Day 15 03:04 — IMMINENT RISING. MAJOR ESCALATION: (1) Iran fires missiles at Doha, Qatar — Qatar military intercepts 2 projectiles over downtown. Key areas evacuated including Musheireb, Lusail (Microsoft HQ), al-Gharafa (US Embassy vicinity). First direct Gulf state attack beyond Dubai. (2) Iran Armed Forces warn: attack on Iran's oil infrastructure → retaliatory strikes on energy facilities of US-cooperating companies region-wide. (3) New Israeli strikes on Tehran overnight ~10pm local: security checkpoints, gov buildings, weapons storage. (4) Parchin Taleghan 2 bunker penetration confirmed by ISIS — bunker busters entered interior of high-explosive testing chamber. (5) Iran expanding target set to US tech firms + banks in Gulf (Google, Microsoft offices evacuated in Doha). Gulf states now direct targets. 86→100 (capped).

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 15 03:04 — IMMINENT STABLE. No new Lebanon-specific operational changes. Reports of drone view damage in northern Israel from Hezbollah barrages (Reuters photo). 773 dead in Lebanon. Ground incursion still TBD as Israel focused on Iran strikes. Netanyahu threatened Hezbollah in press conference. 82 stable.

turkey.notes: CRITICAL — RISING STABLE. Third intercept confirmed by multiple sources (Al Jazeera, NYT, Reuters, France24, Daily Sabah). Residents near Incirlik heard explosions. NATO spokeswoman Hart confirmed. Turkey demands Tehran clarify. Article 4 pressure mounting. No 4th intercept yet — key threshold watch. 53 stable.

india.notes: Stable deterrent. No new signals. IndiGo fuel surcharge from Iran crisis — economic impact only. No escalation indicators.

russia.notes: Day 15 03:04 — RISING STABLE. US sanctions license operational — Russian crude deliveries authorized through Apr 11. European allies furious. Putin-Trump call covered Iran + Ukraine. No new Russia-specific signals this cycle. 34 stable.

china.notes: Day 15 03:04 — RISING STABLE. (1) ISW/AEI: PRC 2026 policy priorities — increased military budget, escalated Taiwan rhetoric, tech emphasis. (2) Warplane flights near Taiwan plunge from 92 to 7 per CNBTC/AP — puzzling analysts, possibly resource reallocation to ME operations. (3) $14B Taiwan arms deal awaits Trump approval — largest ever, kept under wraps ahead of Trump Beijing trip Mar 31-Apr 2. (4) China 'rebuilding grip on North Korea.' (5) 'Missile arc forming around China' analysis (TaiwanPlus). 14 stable.

north_korea.notes: Stable elevated. KCNA condemns Japan's Type-12 long-range missile deployment to Kyushu — calls it regional security risk. Kim Jong Un + daughter photographed practicing with guns (news24online). Recent Choe Hyon destroyer missile test referenced. China-DPRK engagement increasing. 16 stable.

russia_ukraine.notes: Day 15 03:04 — RISING STABLE. US sanctions license now operational. European allies furious. Zelensky: US sought postponement of trilateral talks. Trump deal stalling further as Iran war dominates. No new Ukraine-specific developments this cycle. 35 stable.

pakistan_afghanistan.notes: No new reports in this cycle. Saudi-Pakistan Strategic Mutual Defence Agreement active. China mediating. Stable elevated.

Iran Armed Forces warn: attack on Iran's oil infrastructure → retaliatory strikes on US-cooperating energy firms region-wide (Economic Times)
Iran expands target set to US tech firms in Gulf — Google, Microsoft offices evacuated in Doha, Lusail (AFP/Strait Times)
US destroys 'every military target' on Kharg Island — Trump threatens oil infrastructure next (CNN/Reuters/BBC/NYT)
New Israeli strikes on Tehran overnight — security checkpoints, gov buildings, weapons storage (NYT/CNN)
Parchin bunker penetration confirmed by Institute for Science + Intl Security — bunker busters hit Taleghan 2 interior (ISIS/ISW)
Trump issues formal sanctions license for Russian crude — valid through April 11, European allies furious (Reuters)
Third Iranian missile intercept over Turkey confirmed — NATO spokeswoman, targeted Incirlik base with US B61 weapons (Politico/NYT/Reuters)

new: iran_conventional: Iran fires missiles at Doha, Qatar — first direct attack on Gulf state beyond Dubai. Qatar intercepts 2 projectiles over downtown. Mass evacuations in Musheireb, Lusail, al-Gharafa.
iran_conventional: Iran Armed Forces warn retaliatory strikes on US-cooperating energy firms if Iran's oil infrastructure hit — expanding conflict to regional economic targets
iran_conventional: Iran targeting US tech firms in Gulf — Google/MS offices evacuated in Doha, Iranian media listed tech giants as 'future targets'
zone_changes: iran_conventional: 86→100 (capped at IMMINENT) — Doha attack marks expansion of Iran's retaliatory campaign to Gulf states. Iran now actively targeting US assets across the region.
changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: ESCALATION DEEPENS: Day 15 03:04 — IRAN EXPANDS STRIKES TO QATAR. First direct missile attack on a Gulf state beyond Dubai. Qatar military intercepted 2 projectiles over downtown Doha. Mass evacuations near US Embassy, Google, Microsoft offices. Iran's Armed Forces now threatening retaliatory strikes on any US-cooperating energy firms if Iran's oil infrastructure is hit. This is a clear widening of the conflict — Iran moving from Israel-focused retaliation to Gulf-wide economic targeting. Israeli strikes continue on Tehran overnight. Parchin bunker penetration confirmed. NUCLEAR TRACK: Still de-escalating. KEY WATCH FOR NEXT 6H: (1) Does Trump follow through on Kharg oil infrastructure threat despite Iran's counter-threat? (2) 4th Turkey intercept → Article 4 trigger. (3) Gulf states response to direct attacks — joint defense activation? (4) Iran escalation against US tech/energy firms in Gulf. (5) Hormuz status. (6) Any Iran nuclear posture changes as conventional war intensifies.

latest_news.headline: Iran fires missiles at Doha, Qatar — Qatar military intercepts 2 over downtown, key areas evacuated
latest_news.text: Iran launched missile attack targeting Qatar. Qatar's defense ministry confirmed interception of missile attack. Two projectiles downed over downtown Doha per AFP journalist. Interior ministry evacuated key areas including Musheireb district, Lusail (Microsoft HQ), and al-Gharafa (US Embassy vicinity). Residents rushed to underground car parks. Musheireb hosts Google and American Express offices. Police stationed at Microsoft Qatar HQ. First direct Gulf state attack beyond Dubai.

latest_news.headline: Iran Armed Forces warn retaliatory strikes on US-cooperating energy firms if Iran's oil infrastructure hit
latest_news.text: Iran's unified combatant command warned: any attack on Iran's oil/energy infrastructure will trigger retaliatory strikes on energy facilities owned by oil companies cooperating with the US in the region. Warning follows US strikes on Kharg Island. Iranian news agency had earlier listed tech giants as 'future targets.' Iran expanding threat envelope to regional economic assets.

latest_news.headline: New Israeli strikes on Tehran overnight — security checkpoints, government buildings, weapons storage
latest_news.text: Israeli military launched new wave of strikes on Tehran at approximately 10pm local time. Targets included Iranian security checkpoints, government buildings, and military weapons storage sites. Residents reported heavy explosions. Strikes continue as part of ongoing campaign.

latest_news.headline: Parchin bunker penetration confirmed — bunker busters hit interior of Taleghan 2 high-explosive testing chamber
latest_news.source: Institute for Science + International Security / ISW
latest_news.text: The Institute for Science and International Security reported that the Israeli strike on the Taleghan 2 site at Parchin military complex successfully penetrated the high-explosive testing chamber. Bunker buster bombs pierced the concrete sarcophagus encasing the facility and entered the interior. Iran had been hardening the facility against strikes.

latest_news.headline: US destroys 'every military target' on Kharg Island — Trump threatens oil infrastructure next
latest_news.text: Trump announced US 'totally obliterated' all military targets on Kharg Island. Oil refinery employees reported nearly 2 hours of nonstop explosions. Trump threatened oil infrastructure next if Iran keeps blocking Hormuz. Senior Iranian Oil Ministry official called attacks 'enormous and destructive.'

latest_news.headline: China warplane flights near Taiwan plunge from 92 to 7 — puzzling analysts
latest_news.text: Chinese warplane flights near Taiwan dropped dramatically from 92 to 7, puzzling military analysts. Possible explanation: resource reallocation as US shifts assets to Middle East, creating Pacific force gaps. Meanwhile $14B Taiwan arms deal awaits Trump approval, kept under wraps ahead of Trump's planned Beijing trip March 31-April 2.

latest_news.headline: North Korea condemns Japan's missile deployment to Kyushu — KCNA calls it 'regional security risk'
latest_news.text: North Korea accused Japan of heightening regional security risks by accelerating deployment of long-range Type-12 missiles to Kyushu. KCNA reported the accusation. Kim Jong Un photographed with daughter practicing with guns. Recent Choe Hyon destroyer missile test referenced.

latest_news.headline: Trump issues formal sanctions license for Russian crude — valid through April 11, European allies furious
latest_news.text: US Treasury issued license authorizing delivery and sale of Russian crude loaded before March 12, valid through April 11. European allies 'riled.' Macron calls out Russia hypocrisy. Merz demands Trump account for sanctions relief. Move directly funds Russian war machine.

outlook: CRITICAL — Global war probability RISING to 62%. Day 15 03:04 — IRAN EXPANDS TO QATAR: Iran launched missile attack on Doha — Qatar military intercepted 2 projectiles over downtown. Mass evacuations near US Embassy, Google, Microsoft offices. This is a qualitative escalation: Iran now targeting Gulf states directly beyond Dubai. Iran's Armed Forces simultaneously threatened retaliatory strikes on any US-cooperating energy firms if Iran's oil infrastructure is hit. Iran is widening the conflict to regional economic targets. Israeli strikes continue on Tehran overnight. Parchin bunker penetration confirmed. NUCLEAR TRACK: Still de-escalating — all strikes conventional. KEY WATCH FOR NEXT 6H: (1) Does Trump follow through on Kharg oil infrastructure threat despite Iran's counter-threat? Could trigger Gulf-wide energy war. (2) 4th Turkey intercept → Article 4 trigger. (3) Gulf states response to direct attacks — joint defense activation? UAE, Qatar both struck now. (4) Hormuz status — any sign of reopening. (5) Iran nuclear posture changes as conventional war intensifies. (6) European formal response to Russia sanctions license.
